case_title: RICH TOM VS SILVER TRACY AND SCOTT

docket_entries.description: NOTE:2DFS ROA:POS ONLY FOR SCOTT SILVER(ALSO DECLR D).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,598.00 FILED BY RICH TOM AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER TRACY AND SCOTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
THE 2 DFS' NAMES NOT SEPARATED AT CLM FILING DATE, THEREFORE POS SHOWS 2 DFS APPARENTLY SRVD, BUT ACT UALLY ONLY ONE(1)WAS SRVD(SCOTT SILVER).
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICH TOM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SILVER TRACY AND SCOTT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-28-1992, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER TRACY AND SCOTT
